translated: So, Sakura, your birthday is coming up on April 3rd. I know it's sudden, but do you have any goals for this year?
I hadn't thought about it at all.
I was actually trying to do an impression of Sayuri just now,
but it didn't sound like her at all.
But I kind of get it.
The things you were saying were actually pretty spot on.
It felt like you were just rambling on about nothing,
which is kind of my vibe today.
Did the way I spoke sound like her?
I wasn't really satisfied with it myself, though,
so I want to get to know everyone better and,
make this a year where I communicate more and get to know everyone even better.
Reflecting on things even in a moment like this...
Last year, I didn't really get to hang out with the Liella! members much in my private time,
so I hope we can make lots of memories together this year.
I'm so happy to hear that.
You guys are the first ones to celebrate with me!
Well then, we'll be talking about the live concert today as well,
so let's have a fun show. Please stay with us until the end. Love Live! Superstar!! Musuba Musubi Broadcasting Station: Liellaji! Let's Super Start!
Love Live! Superstar!! Musuba Musubi Broadcasting Station: Liellaji!
Once again, I'm Sakakura Sakura, aka Saku-chan, the voice of Onitsuka Tomari.
I'm Date Sayuri, aka Sayurin, the voice of Shibuya Kanon.
And I'm Yabushima Akane, aka Yabu-chan, the voice of Yoneme Mei.
Now, it's time for the Yuigaoka Girls' High School Submission Box, where we read your letters!
Everyone, all together! One, two... Submission Box!
This one is from Liellaji Name: Rodem-sansei.
"but 'Pop Talking' performed by the 2nd-years was especially memorable."
"It's a bright song to begin with, but seeing the four 2nd-years just being their usual selves fit the song perfectly."
"It felt like you were all singing so freely and having a great time."
"Also, seeing Yabushima-san sobbing while talking about this song during the MC was so emotional."
Next is from Liellaji Name: Masumasu OK-san.
"I attended every single performance of the 7th Live for the first time."
"Even with the same songs, every show had something different, and it was so exciting."
"Especially 'Pop Talking'—the four 2nd-years looked like they were having so much fun singing and dancing, like they were having a bright conversation."
"It was a song that really made me feel the bond between the 2nd-years."
